description: Prevent an object from being moved into one of its own descendants

replacements.new:
<ROUTINE OPT-DESCENDANT? (OBJ ANCESTOR "AUX" (COUNT 0))
	<REPEAT ()
		<SET OBJ <LOC .OBJ>>
		<COND (<NOT .OBJ> <RFALSE>)
		      (<EQUAL? .OBJ .ANCESTOR> <RTRUE>)
		      (<G? <SET COUNT <+ .COUNT 1>> 255>
		       ;"A pre-existing malformed cycle must not be extended."
		       <RTRUE>)>>>

<ROUTINE V-PUT ()
